creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 218655
config.log

I was trying to install bhyve-firmware from ports. gcc48 is a dependency, but it failed during the configure phase. I checked the config.log, and it appears that the primary problem is in regard to the ISL library. I'm running 13.0-CURRENT #4 88ab3e83466-c272139(master).
